nasb.text: Behold, these are the fringes of His ways; And how faint a word we hear of Him! But His mighty thunder, who can understand?”

esv.text: Behold, these are but the outskirts of his ways, and how small a whisper do we hear of him! But the thunder of his power who can understand?”

cnv.text: 這些不過是他的作為的一點點， 我們從他那裡所聽到的，是多麼的微小！ 他大能的雷聲誰能夠明白呢？”

ccb.text: 看啊，这不过是祂作为的一斑， 是我们听到的少许回音！ 谁能领悟祂的雷霆万钧？”
